purpose: Public header for PreferencesWindow — DocumentWindow that hosts the unified signal-flow editor (INPUT → AUDIO CHAIN → OUTPUT → DEVICE SETTINGS). Plugin chain changes are staged locally until the user clicks Apply.
invariants: onApply is called with the final {chain, bypass} pair only when the user clicks Apply; the constructor argument values are the initial state, not authoritative through the window's lifetime.
onClose must release the owning IconMenu's preferencesWindow pointer — failing to do so leaks the window and prevents reopening.
refreshPluginChain pushes external chain changes into the staged UI; it does NOT trigger onApply.
gotchas: Both the DocumentWindow and its content component (PreferencesContentComponent, file-private in .cpp) listen to AudioDeviceManager; the cast in refreshPluginChain is the documented API for IconMenu to talk to the content component.
